query_normalized: evaluating resting‑state fmri entropy as a biomarker for attention‑deficit traits neuroscience
rationale: The paper investigates a temporal‑complexity measure (long‑memory parameters) of rs‑fMRI signals in the ADHD‑200 cohort and relates it to ADHD symptom severity, thus providing evidence on a related rs‑fMRI dynamical biomarker in the same population (criterion b, and also aligns with the same‑mechanism category a).
